title: Resolution Authorizing the Honorable Mayor Antonio L. Kalaw to Revert the Allowable Maintenance and Operating Expense (MOOE) Allotments for Fy 2020 to Other Benefits for the Payment of Collective Negotiation Agreement (CNA) Incentive. (AUTHORS: COUNCILOR(S) : Janos S. Lapiz, Geronimo A. Ciceron, Marlo Pj A. Alipon, Mark Lester B. Dizon, Cris Dayril B. Bagnes, Jozylyn N. Manansala, 12/22/2020)
